display.purpose: Hero headlines and main catalog banners.

title.purpose: Tool card headings and modal titles.

label.purpose: Category chips, pricing tags, and filter pills.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Subtle depth for tool grid cards at rest.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Interactive lift on tool card hover.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Smooth transition for card hover, border color shifts, and button states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action for external links and primary user flows.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Visit Website <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path><polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline><line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background-color: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #1d4ed8; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action for setup guides, documentation, and alternate views.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #ffffff; color: #334155; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #f8fafc; border-color: #cbd5e1; }

components.name: Tool Card
components.description: Catalog item card showing tool icon, title, description, and tags.
components.html:
TH

Uptime Kuma

Self-Hosted

A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool featuring real-time status pages, notification hooks, and ping monitoring.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.05), 0 8px 24px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04); transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.06), 0 14px 32px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.08); border-color: #93c5fd; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; background: #eff6ff; color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; margin: 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; color: #64748b; margin: 0; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-badge-green { background: #f0fdf4; color: #166534; }

components.name: Category Filter Chip
components.description: Interactive pill filter button for catalog categories.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff; color: #475569; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #cbd5e1; background: #f8fafc; } .ds-chip-active { background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; border-color: #2563eb; }

narrative.overview: ToolHunt's design system delivers crisp visual contrast, sharp typographic hierarchy, and fast technical surfaces optimized for rapid software discovery. Built for developers, sysadmins, and self-hosters scanning through catalogs of apps, the UI prioritizes clarity, search efficiency, and direct utility over decorative fluff.
keyCharacteristics: High Information Density: Structured content grid cards designed for fast scanning.
Crisp Technical Contrast: Distinct light and dark modes with dedicated slate borders.
Purposeful Micro-Interactions: Subtle translateY(-2px) elevation lifts and border highlights.
Zero-Slop Restraint: Rejects heavy side-stripes, text gradients, over-rounding, and sketchy SVG illustrations.

rules.name: The Single Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary blue accent carries interactive authority. Never mix multiple accent colors within a single button group or primary CTA.

rules.name: The True Neutral Rule
rules.body: Background neutrals use pure slate and deep navy hues. Warm cream/sand tints and low-contrast washed grays are strictly forbidden.

rules.name: The Display Letter-Spacing Floor Rule
rules.body: Display headlines must never fall below -0.03em letter-spacing.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All cards and container panels are flat with structural 1px borders at rest. Shadows function purely as interactive feedback.

dos: Do maintain strict body text contrast (>=4.5:1) against both light and dark backgrounds.
Do enforce 16px corner radius max for cards and 12px for buttons.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings and cap line lengths at 65–75ch for prose readability.
Do keep display letter-spacing at or above -0.03em.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or decorative background grid overlays.
Don't use warm cream, sand, or parchment body backgrounds (--paper, --cream, --sand).
Don't over-round container cards with 24px, 32px, or 40px corner radii.
